heading: Configure dateFacet Field Properties
body:
The MongoDB Search `numberFacet` type takes the following parameters:

| Option         | Type    | Necessity | Description                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        | Default |
| -------------- | ------- | --------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------- |
| type           | string  | Required  | The type of field. Value must be numberFacet.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |         |
| representation | string  | Optional  | The data type of the field to index. Values can be one of the following BSON (Binary Javascript Object Notation) types:int64 - for indexing large integers without loss of precision and for rounding double values to integers. You can't use this type to index large double values.double - for indexing large double values without rounding.To learn more, see example below. | double  |
| indexIntegers  | boolean | Optional  | Indicates whether to index or omit indexing int32 and int64 type values. Value can be true or false. Either this or indexDoubles must be true.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     | true    |
| indexDoubles   | boolean | Optional  | Indicates whether to index or omit indexing double type values. Value can be true or false. Either this or indexIntegers must be true.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                             | true    |
